name: igniteui-api-mcp
description: MCP server for IgniteUI API reference documentation

scripts.build:docs:angular: npm run build && node scripts/build-docs.mjs angular
scripts.build:docs:react: npm run build && node scripts/build-docs.mjs react
scripts.build:docs:webcomponents: npm run build && node scripts/build-docs.mjs webcomponents
scripts.build:docs:all: npm run build:docs:angular && npm run build:docs:react && npm run build:docs:webcomponents
